description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Stable Compilation that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to compile and test the repository on multiple Linux environments including Debian 11, Ubuntu 22.04, Debian 12, and Ubuntu 24.04. For each environment, install dependencies, clone the repository optionally at a specified ref, use a gcc problem matcher, compile and install the project with specific cmake flags, and run tests.
